personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Front End Engineer • React & Next.js
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Front-End Engineer specializing in the React ecosystem (Next.js 15) and AI architecture orchestration (LLM, RAG). Expert in legacy system modernization and design of highly scalable SaaS platforms. Recognized for aligning technical excellence (high availability, performance optimization) with business objectives, while ensuring data security (RGPD, PCI-DSS) and elevating development teams.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France | VPF Visa – Free access to the French job market

experience.title: Front End Web Developer
responsibilities: Led the migration of a legacy PHP monolith to a modern Frontend stack (Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS), supporting peak loads of 1,200 Requests Per Second (RPS) with AWS auto-scaling guaranteeing 99.95% availability.

Radically optimized Frontend performance (Zustand, TanStack Query) by eliminating unnecessary re-renders, achieving a 30% reduction in load time and boosting conversion by 5% for 200k+ Monthly Active Users.

Spearheaded the transition to TypeScript and Clean Architecture for a team of 3 developers. Deployed an E2E test suite (Playwright) covering 80% of critical paths, reducing regressions by 35% and accelerating code reviews by 40%.

experience.title: Freelance Front-End Developer
responsibilities: ZIRO.FIT (FinTech Marketplace) : Architected an interactive marketplace frontend (Next.js, Leaflet, Tailwind CSS) processing $500k+ monthly GMV via Stripe Connect, with strict PCI-DSS security compliance and complex data visualizations.

Lexity (AI EdTech) : Deployed a secure AI platform (data sanitization for RGPD compliance) with RAG-based feedback and a fault-tolerant LLM executor, maintaining a sub-200ms Time To First Token (TTFT) and 99.9% uptime.
Interly (AI Coaching) : Built a real-time AI voice coaching platform supporting 500+ concurrent audio streams with <300ms latency, via Web Audio API and Google Speech-to-Text integration.

experience.title: Junior Front End Web Developer
responsibilities: Developed responsive, accessible React components for Enterprise applications (processing 50k+ requests/day), contributing to a reusable component library that reduced development time by 25%.
Standardized code review processes with a structured checklist, reducing review turnaround time by 25%, keeping post-merge defects under 2 per sprint, and accelerating overall delivery cycles by 20%.
